signals.title: Summer in the Old Town
signals.location: Various venues in the Old Town, Plovdiv
signals.reason: An ongoing cultural initiative offering gentle walks and open-air activities, perfect for a relaxed family stroll in the shaded, historic streets.
signals.note: Verified as an ongoing festival running throughout the summer of 2026 in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Groove Valley Festival in Kazanlak
signals.reason: An easy 75-minute drive from Plovdiv, this outdoor park festival offers green spaces for a 4-year-old to move around in a lively, music-filled atmosphere.
signals.note: Verified as a real open-air festival in Kazanlak on July 4, 2026, which is within a 90-minute drive.

signals.title: Western Festival (Уестърн фестивал)
signals.reason: An incredibly kid-friendly western-themed weekend with horses and outdoor games, located in the fresh mountain air of Velingrad (~80 min drive).
signals.note: Verified as a real event scheduled at Dengri Eco Resorts in Velingrad on the correct dates.

signals.title: International Folklore Festival
signals.reason: A free, vibrant celebration with colorful costumes and energetic music that will easily captivate a 4-year-old's attention in a majestic outdoor Roman setting.
signals.note: Verified as the 30th International Folklore Festival occurring July 27-31, 2026, at the Ancient Theatre.

signals.title: Rowing Channel Family Bike Ride
signals.reason: A completely flat, car-free paved loop with bike, family-kart, and scooter rentals on-site, perfect for an active but easy outdoor morning with a toddler.
signals.note: Verified as an active, evergreen family-friendly activity in Plovdiv.
